certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

gaps: Limited explicit provisions for documented information retention and audit trail completeness required by ISO 42001 Clause 7.5
Escalation rules do not reference management review or internal audit integration (Clause 9.2/9.3)
No coverage of broader AI impact monitoring (e.g., ethical/societal risks) beyond incidents and performance metrics
recommendations: Add mandatory logging of all severity assessments, notifications, and corrective action outcomes with retention periods aligned to ISO 42001
Define scheduled management review triggers and internal audit sampling of post-market data
Extend metric_monitoring_and_feedback_integration to include ethical impact indicators and stakeholder feedback channels

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: high. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: Limited explicit provisions for documented information retention and audit trail completeness required by ISO 42001 Clause 7.5
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
